combined_text_for_llm: What is a Piano Fake Book? "What is a Piano Fake Book? March 4, 2016 / 0 Comments / by Shanika You walk into your sheet music store and start browsing. You look at the method books, technique books, repertoire… and then your eyes see something else. You pick it up and see it is called a “fake book.” An odd name for a real boo
